title: Diagnose an OnPush component that will not update
description: Trace a stale OnPush view to an in-place mutation or a change that did not flow through an input or async pipe.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm the component uses OnPush. 2. Identify how the changed data reaches it: @Input reference, async-piped observable, or internal event. 3. Check whether the data was mutated in place (same reference) instead of replaced, which OnPush ignores. 4. Replace the object/array immutably or bind via async so a new reference/emission triggers detection. 5. Only as a last resort use markForCheck for a justified imperative update. Rollback point: before adding manual detection calls. Validation: a test shows the view updates when the input is replaced and does not when it is mutated.
